answer: On September 15, 2026, the Florida purchase escrow disbursement reconciliation was overstated because the pipeline settlement_disbursement_recon_v3 incorrectly joined party_identity_bridge by normalized_tax_id instead of closing_party_role_id. This caused duplicate matching of buyer and seller party roles within the same closing, inflating disbursements in finance.disbursement_recon_daily for FNF National Title closings.

facts.affected_segment: Florida purchase closings for FNF National Title
facts.remediation: Switch the transform to closing_party_role_id, quarantine normalized_tax_id joins in reconciliation workloads, and backfill Florida purchase closings for FNF National Title. The rebuild target is finance.disbursement_recon_daily, sourced from settlement.escrow_disbursement_fact.
facts.root_cause: settlement_disbursement_recon_v3 joined party_identity_bridge by normalized_tax_id which matched multiple buyer and seller party roles inside the same closing, duplicating escrow disbursements in finance.disbursement_recon_daily
